title: Design Landing Page Layout
description: Create the structure and layout for the new landing page, ensuring it aligns with the application's global layout and branding.
details: Implement a new page under the appropriate Next.js route (e.g., `src/app/landing/page.tsx` or similar). Use the existing global layout (`layout.tsx`) for consistency. The landing page should introduce the application, highlight its core features (chat playground, real-time AI interaction, etc.), and provide a clear call-to-action (e.g., 'Start Chatting'). Use semantic HTML and ensure accessibility (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation).
test_strategy: Verify the landing page renders correctly at the intended route. Check for layout consistency, accessibility compliance (keyboard navigation, ARIA labels), and correct display of all key sections. Use browser dev tools and accessibility checkers.

title: Implement Navigation to Chat Playground
description: Add navigation from the landing page to the main chat playground (home page) via a prominent button or link.
details: Place a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Start Chatting') on the landing page. Use Next.js's Link component to route users to the chat playground (`/`). Ensure the button is accessible and visually prominent. Optionally, add a test ID for automated testing.
test_strategy: Test that clicking the button/link navigates to the chat playground. Confirm accessibility (focus, ARIA labels) and that navigation works on both desktop and mobile.

title: Style Landing Page
description: Apply styles to the landing page for a visually appealing and responsive design.
details: Use global CSS (`globals.css`) and, if needed, scoped styles to ensure the landing page matches the application's look and feel. Make the page responsive for both desktop and mobile. Ensure color contrast and font sizes meet accessibility standards. Avoid style collisions with other components.
test_strategy: Check the landing page on multiple screen sizes and browsers. Use accessibility tools to verify color contrast and font sizes. Confirm that styles do not interfere with other parts of the application.

title: Add Basic Content and Feature Highlights
description: Populate the landing page with introductory content and a summary of the application's core features.
details: Write concise, engaging copy that introduces the agent-ui application and its main benefits (e.g., interactive AI chat, real-time responses, easy-to-use interface). Use headings, paragraphs, and icons or illustrations as appropriate. Ensure all text is accessible and easy to read.
test_strategy: Review the landing page content for clarity, correctness, and accessibility. Check that all feature highlights are present and easy to understand. Optionally, conduct a peer review for copy quality.
